name: Unverified Ownership
description: The product does not properly verify that a critical resource is owned by the proper entity. This allows attackers to gain unauthorized access to system resources by bypassing ownership checks, potentially enabling privilege escalation.
detection_pattern: Look for EXTERNAL nodes (user requests, API calls, process operations) that access or modify STORAGE or STRUCTURAL nodes (critical resources, processes, files) without a CONTROL mediator (ownership verification check, resource-to-owner mapping validation) that confirms the requesting entity is the legitimate owner of the target resource before permitting the operation.
